# ProAthletica (athletica.page)

ProAthletica is a data-driven fitness equipment review platform. We analyze thousands of verified customer reviews and technical specifications to rank home gym gear.

## Editorial Focus
- Home gym equipment for small spaces, apartments, and busy parents.
- Independent, data-driven rankings with no paid placements.
- Transparent methodology using the Athletica Lab protocol.

## Key Resources
- Homepage: https://www.athletica.page/
- About Our Mission: https://www.athletica.page/about
- Editorial Methodology: https://www.athletica.page/methodology
- Top Picks Roundup: https://www.athletica.page/best/best-home-gym-equipment
- Equipment Categories: https://www.athletica.page/categories

## Methodology Summary
We use a proprietary 100-point scoring system based on:
1. Durability & Material Specs (Steel gauge, warranty)
2. Performance Benchmarks (Adjustability, stability)
3. Owner Sentiment (Analyzing 47,000+ verified reviews)
4. Value for Money (Total cost of ownership)
